name: 男主公寓（獨居空間）
description: 男主獨居的公寓成為兩人關係升級的關鍵場所——從借住、照顧發燒，到後來的同居、親密互動，空間私密性推動感情從曖昧到明確。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: There are two bedrooms in my place. Feel free to pick one to sleep in. / Why are you registering my fingerprint? If you go out at night, I wouldn't bother opening the door for you. / Where do I sleep? / With me, of course.
examples.context: 男主獨居的公寓成為兩人關係升級的關鍵場所——從借住、照顧發燒，到後來的同居、親密互動，空間私密性推動感情從曖昧到明確。
